kba_problem_summary: Temporary loss of communication from CIOC/CIOC2 to PK Controller causes I/O Input/Output Failure, module errors, loops transitioning to IMAN mode and subsequent process trips.
severity_justification: Direct loss of I/O data to the controller results in process trips and loss of control over affected control loops.
occurrence_justification: The communication loss occurs suddenly but requires specific (unspecified) conditions; affects a wide range of versions indicating plausible occurrence.
detectability_justification: Errors are visible via module status, Event Chronicle messages ('I/O Input Failure', 'I/O Output Failure') and loops going to IMAN, but the initial data loss can be brief.

modifiers_applied.reason: No workaround exists, increasing exposure time
Affects PK Controller and CIOC/CIOC2 hardware at control and field level
Hotfix bundles or upgrade path available for several affected versions

architecture_level_description: Livello 1: Controllo base (controller PK, schede I/O CIOC/CIOC2)
fix_reference: NK-1900-0840 (v14.LTS), NK-2200-0045 (v14.FP3), NK-2400-0598 (v15.FP3); upgrade a v15.LTS per versioni più vecchie
confidence_note: La frequenza esatta e le condizioni precise che scatenano la perdita temporanea di comunicazione non sono specificate nella KBA.
red_flags: Loss of I/O communication to controller
Affected loops go to IMAN mode
notes: Problema critico ai livelli 0-1 con impatto diretto su continuità di controllo e produzione. Si raccomanda di applicare gli hotfix o eseguire l'upgrade alle versioni supportate il prima possibile.
